body: {"ac_map":[{"parent_ac":"1. TestImporter_Apply_WritesToPostgres covers importing active plus archive JSONL beads into the Axon-backed store and asserts bead and inline-event counts.","coverage":"Child 2 AC1 covers active plus archive writes and bead/inline-event counts; Child 2 AC2 covers archive state preservation; Child 2 AC3 covers inline-event persistence."},{"parent_ac":"2. TestImporter_Apply_Idempotent_OnReRun covers a second import reporting zero new bead/event writes and not duplicating target records.","coverage":"Child 3 AC1 covers zero new bead/event writes and no duplicate target records on rerun; Child 3 AC2 covers not rewriting already-matching rows where evidence is available."},{"parent_ac":"3. TestImporter_Apply_RespectsLimit covers MigrateAxonOptions.Limit importing only the first N source beads and associated events.","coverage":"Child 1 AC2 covers MigrateAxonOptions.Limit importing only the first N prepared source beads and associated inline events."},{"parent_ac":"4. TestMigrateToAxonNoSources covers empty or missing active/archive sources returning zero counts without error.","coverage":"Child 1 AC3 covers empty or missing active/archive sources returning zero counts without error."},{"parent_ac":"5. TestMigrator_MigrateToAxon_ReturnsImporterResult covers storeMigrator.MigrateToAxon delegating to the real importer and no longer returning ErrDeprecated.","coverage":"Child 3 AC3 covers storeMigrator.MigrateToAxon delegation to the real importer and no ErrDeprecated result; Child 3 AC4 covers Store.migrateToAxonWithOptions invoking the importer with options."},{"parent_ac":"6. cd cli \u0026\u0026 go test ./internal/bead/... -run 'TestImporter_Apply_WritesToPostgres|TestImporter_Apply_Idempotent_OnReRun|TestImporter_Apply_RespectsLimit|TestMigrateToAxonNoSources|TestMigrator_MigrateToAxon_ReturnsImporterResult' passes.","coverage":"Child 1 AC4 covers source/limit/no-source tests; Child 2 AC4 covers write-path tests; Child 3 AC5 covers idempotency and migrator delegation tests."},{"parent_ac":"7. cd cli \u0026\u0026 go test ./... passes.","coverage":"Child 1 AC5, Child 2 AC5, and Child 3 AC6 each require cd cli \u0026\u0026 go test ./... passes."},{"parent_ac":"8. lefthook run pre-commit passes.","coverage":"Child 1 AC6, Child 2 AC6, and Child 3 AC7 each require lefthook run pre-commit passes."}],"child_ids":["ddx-862c21e7","ddx-1b3b813c","ddx-27d066b5"],"rationale":"The parent bead crosses three independently verifiable concerns: deterministic source corpus preparation, first-run Axon persistence, and caller-facing idempotent migrator behavior. Splitting along those boundaries keeps each child executable from its own description while preserving TD-027, parent/decomposition IDs, all non-scope constraints, and the full verification gate set."}
